sourceMethodology: Web research from public operator disclosures, Wikipedia, FCC/ITU filings, World Teleport Association profiles, and news articles. Coordinates at operator-stated precision; commercial communication pair routing not validated by this registry. Inclusion limited to stations where a public source documents support for at least two of {LEO, MEO, GEO}, either through (a) the operator's own multi-orbit fleet (e.g., SES GEO+MEO, Eutelsat GEO+LEO), (b) third-party hosted multi-orbit gateways (e.g., teleport hosting GEO antennas plus an O3b mPOWER or OneWeb gateway), or (c) a ground-network operator whose published catalogue advertises LEO + MEO + GEO + HEO support.

stations.name: Svalbard Satellite Station (SvalSat)
stations.primaryUseCase: Polar EO/TT&C ground network; multi-mission LEO + MEO + GEO + HEO support per KSAT global network catalogue
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Wikipedia coordinates 78°13'46"N 15°23'43"E for Platåberget site near Longyearbyen.

stations.name: Troll Satellite Station (TrollSat)
stations.primaryUseCase: Antarctic polar EO/TT&C ground station; sister station to SvalSat in KSAT pole-to-pole network
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: KSAT-stated location 72°01'S 2°32'E in Queen Maud Land.

stations.name: Tromsø Satellite Station (TSS)
stations.primaryUseCase: KSAT operations hub at 69°N; backbone for SvalSat and TrollSat
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Coordinates per Wikipedia/latitude.to listings for KSAT Tromsø.

stations.name: KSAT Punta Arenas Ground Station
stations.primaryUseCase: Southern hemisphere KSAT site; NASA NiSAR/Pace Ka-band support and Iridium gateway
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: KSAT states 28 km north of Punta Arenas; coords listed at municipality center.

stations.name: Inuvik Satellite Station Facility (ISSF)
stations.primaryUseCase: Multi-tenant Canadian Arctic TT&C/EO ground station hosting KSAT, SSC, DLR, CNES antennas
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Operator-stated 68°24'N 133°30'W; ISSF Town of Inuvik / NRCan disclosure.

stations.name: KSAT Hartebeesthoek (co-located with SANSA)
stations.primaryUseCase: KSAT mid-latitude station co-sited with SANSA TT&C campus; SANSA serves LEO+MEO+GEO commercial+gov missions
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Coordinates per SANSA / ILRS public station info.

stations.name: KSAT Singapore Mid-Latitude Station
stations.primaryUseCase: KSAT equatorial mid-latitude station in Southeast Asia per KSAT global network catalogue
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Exact site within Singapore not disclosed publicly; listed at city-state center.

stations.name: KSAT Dubai Mid-Latitude Station
stations.primaryUseCase: KSAT Middle East mid-latitude station per KSAT global network catalogue
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Exact emirate-internal site not publicly disclosed; listed at Dubai city center.

stations.name: KSAT Mauritius Mid-Latitude Station
stations.primaryUseCase: KSAT Indian Ocean mid-latitude station per KSAT global network catalogue
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Exact site within Mauritius not publicly disclosed; listed at island center.

stations.name: KSAT Fairbanks Alaska Ground Station
stations.primaryUseCase: KSAT Alaskan polar-supporting station per KSAT global network catalogue
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Exact site within Fairbanks area not publicly disclosed; listed at Fairbanks center.

stations.name: Awarua Satellite Ground Station (KSAT partner / SpaceOps NZ)
stations.primaryUseCase: Southern New Zealand TT&C/EO station; KSAT partner site supporting commercial and agency LEO+MEO+GEO
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Wikipedia/Wikidata coordinates 46°31'48"S 168°22'48"E for Awarua Plains site.

stations.name: SES Betzdorf Teleport (HQ)
stations.primaryUseCase: SES HQ multi-orbit fleet operations centre; controls GEO and MEO (O3b/O3b mPOWER) constellations
stations.publicDisclosureNotes: Betzdorf Castle / SES HQ coordinates per Luxembourg public sources; SES self-describes as multi-orbit (GEO+MEO).
